2026-04-16T00:31:24.302Z	b9ad8f64-368e-410b-a836-c325ee84fffb	INFO	SELVY_DEBUG execute-sql {"metric_id":"orders_analytics","variation_id":"avg_items_per_order","sql":"SELECT
  marketplace_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,

  SUM(CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE)) AS total_units,

  SUM(CAST(our_price AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0) AS avg_order_value
FROM "andes"."ufg_mena_bi.anow_orders_master"
WHERE CAST(order_day AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST('2026-03-30' AS DATE) AND CAST('2026-04-05' AS DATE) AND marketplace_id = 623225021
GROUP BY marketplace_id
ORDER BY marketplace_id ASC"}
